title: Russian-Style Pilaf Bread
description: A savory pilaf dish wrapped in soft, flaky bread for a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: 2. Cut the soft bread into 1-inch cubes and set aside.
3. In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil over medium heat.
4. Add the chopped onions and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
5. Add the diced carrots and minced garlic and continue to sauté for another 5 minutes.
6. In a large bowl, combine the pilaf mix, chicken broth, salt, and pepper.
7. Add the cooked vegetables to the bowl and stir to combine.
8. Pour the pilaf mixture into a 9x13-inch baking dish.
9. Top the pilaf mixture with the bread cubes.
10. Drizzle the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil over the bread.
11. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the bread is golden brown and the pilaf is heated through.
